message:
feat: Add chunked GPU operations for memory-safe large dataset processing

Implements partition-based chunked processing for GPU operations:

- OPFSResultBuffer: Streams large results to OPFS to avoid OOM
- ChunkedGPUJoiner: Partition-based hash join that processes data
  in chunks fitting in GPU memory
- ChunkedGPUGrouper: Partial aggregation across chunks with merge

Key features:
- Memory budget enforcement (default 256MB GPU memory)
- Automatic partitioning for large datasets
- CPU fallback when GPU unavailable or data too small
- OPFS overflow buffer for intermediate results
- Streaming results without loading all into memory

This prevents OOM when joining/grouping million+ row datasets.
